body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. New test TestServerServiceRestart_ReconcilesDesiredWorkers starts a real test server or process-backed WorkerManager with desired_count=1, simulates server restart, and proves a fresh managed ddx work child appears without calling `ddx worker reconcile`.","coverage":"Child 1 AC1 covers TestServerServiceRestart_ReconcilesDesiredWorkers; Child 1 AC4-AC5 preserve go test and lefthook gates."},{"parent_ac":"2. New test TestServerStartupReconcile_SkipsOrPrunesStaleDesiredProjects seeds stale desired-state/project entries and proves startup reconcile does not spawn repeat exited workers for missing/invalid projects; an audit/error is exposed with the project path.","coverage":"Child 2 AC1 covers stale desired-state/project seeding and no repeat exited workers; Child 2 AC2 covers audit/error with project path; Child 2 AC5-AC6 preserve go test and lefthook gates."},{"parent_ac":"3. Existing TestServerStartupReconcileReplacesTerminatedWorker still passes and is extended or paired with production-path assertions, not only fake-controller assertions.","coverage":"Child 3 AC1 preserves existing TestServerStartupReconcileReplacesTerminatedWorker; Child 3 AC2 covers extension or paired production-path test; Child 3 AC5-AC6 preserve go test and lefthook gates."},{"parent_ac":"4. `ddx worker status --json --project \u003cpath\u003e` after restart reports exactly the desired running worker for each valid project and no unrelated stale-project workers.","coverage":"Child 1 AC3 covers exactly desired running workers for valid projects after restart; Child 2 AC4 covers no unrelated stale-project workers; Child 3 AC4 covers combined status behavior in the production-path replacement scenario."},{"parent_ac":"5. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/...` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC4, Child 2 AC5, and Child 3 AC5 each preserve `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/...`."},{"parent_ac":"6. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC5, Child 2 AC6, and Child 3 AC6 each preserve `lefthook run pre-commit`."}],"child_ids":["ddx-1add151d","ddx-003b10ac","ddx-7608f739"],"rationale":"The parent bead mixes three independently executable concerns: process-backed restart restoration, stale desired-project safety, and production-path coverage for existing startup replacement behavior. Splitting along those boundaries keeps each child small enough for a worker to implement and verify while preserving the parent non-scope constraints, plan label, status verification, and required test gates."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
